# PWG-RU launch statistics (auto-generated)

_Created: 09-07-2026 · Last updated: 24-07-2026_

Auto-generated by [`src/pilot/harvest_launch_stats.py`](src/pilot/harvest_launch_stats.py) from the local window ledger, [`LAUNCH_FUCKUPS.md`](LAUNCH_FUCKUPS.md), and the content-failure gallery. Do not hand-edit — re-run the harvester. This is the quantitative companion to the narrative typology in `LAUNCH_FUCKUPS.md`: the denominator and the rates that turn the typology into an evidence table.

Generated: 2026-07-24T19:37:39Z

**Population source (H462 provenance):** `src\pilot\output\window_ledger.jsonl` under data-root `C:\Users\user\Documents\GitHub\SanskritLexicography\RussianTranslation` — **473** rows. The window ledger is local-only (gitignored): a harvest run from a worktree whose own `output/` holds only that worktree's launches silently swaps the denominator (the 09-07-2026 committed edition reported 3 windows from a worktree ledger while the main checkout held 450). Always state — and check — this line before citing a rate.

> **Denominator bias (H462):** every rate below is conditioned on *"we chose to launch"*. Launches correctly REFUSED by the probe gate never enter the window ledger, so this file structurally cannot see them: **1** abort row(s) and **8** NO-GO warm-up(s) are on record in [`GENERATION_API_PROBE_LOG.md`](GENERATION_API_PROBE_LOG.md), kept as a separate denominator by design — merging them would change the meaning of every existing rate.

## 1. Population (denominator) — every launched window

- Windows launched: **473**  ·  distinct roots: **62**
- Date span: 2026-06-27 → 2026-07-15
- Hard-fail windows (stale-refused + crashed): **113** = **23.89%**
- Windows that requeued at least once: **357** (mean **12.39** requeues when they did)

> Caveat — `needs_requeue` is the *normal* iterative state, not a failure; folding it into "failed" would be the denominator error this table exists to avoid. The honest hard-fail rate counts only stale-refused + crashed outcomes.

| outcome | windows |
|---|---|
| `stale-refused` | 108 |
| `clean` | 3 |
| `partial` | 5 |
| `iterating` | 350 |
| `crashed` | 5 |
| `other` | 2 |

**Metric coverage (the instrumentation gap the paper must disclose):** wall-clock recorded on 12/473 windows, output-tokens on 1/473, generating-model on 0/473 windows. Per-window cost/latency must be back-filled from transcript dirs (`parse_workflow_cost.py`) or captured going forward — it is not yet in the ledger. Per-window `gen_model` is stamped going forward (H390 Phase 1); rows generated before that instrumentation carry none and appear under `(unstamped)` below.

## 1b. Population by generating model (H390 Phase 1 — the A/B axis)
